mnemonics: Module 5: RESOURCES - Read, Explore, Study, Organize, Understand, Review, Consult, Engage, Summarize
keyPoints: Suggested resources are curated to provide foundational knowledge and practical insights.
Resources often include a mix of academic papers, textbooks, online courses, and interactive tools.
The goal is to guide independent learning beyond the core curriculum.
commonMistakes: Assuming the suggested resources are optional and not essential for a deeper understanding.
Trying to consume every single resource instead of strategically selecting those that fill personal knowledge gaps.
Focusing solely on one type of resource (e.g., only videos) and ignoring others (e.g., research papers).
